name: Avakaya
steps: Wipe the mangoes completely dry and cut into cubes with the hard shell intact.
Mix red chilli powder, mustard powder, salt and fenugreek seeds in a dry bowl.
Toss the mango pieces and garlic in the masala until every piece is coated thick.
Pack into a dry ceramic jar and pour sesame oil until the masala is soaked through.
Rest three days, mix once with a dry spoon, top with more oil, and it is ready — the king of Telugu pickles.
